codeReview.summary: This is a verification feature confirming that the initial page load flow (app shell → skeleton → API load → album appear with animation) works correctly. The worker performed thorough manual testing with agent-browser at multiple viewports and verified all expected behaviors. No code changes were made - commit ce55578 was a documentation-only commit for user testing synthesis. The existing implementation correctly handles the initial load flow.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The initial load flow implementation uses an AbortController pattern to handle request cancellation. When a new album request is made, the previous request is aborted. This prevents race conditions but is not documented in AGENTS.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: App.tsx lines 44-63: loadAlbum creates a new AbortController, aborts any previous controller, and passes the signal to fetchRandomAlbum. The finally block checks requestId === requestIdRef.current before setting loading=false to avoid stale state updates from aborted requests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The album-enter animation timing (320ms ease-out) is well-tuned for smooth initial load perception. This value was refined by previous workers and could be useful for future animation timing decisions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: index.css line 164: .album-enter { animation: album-in 320ms ease-out; } and App.tsx lines 146-156: the element receives 'album-enter' class only when album exists, and the key={albumKey} prop ensures re-animation when albumKey increments after successful load.

summary: PASS: The cross-flow-initial-load feature verification was thorough and complete. The worker correctly identified that this was a verification feature for already-implemented functionality. Manual testing confirmed: (1) skeleton placeholder shows during initial load, (2) API endpoint returns valid album data, (3) album renders with album-enter animation (320ms ease-out), (4) loading overlay with spinner appears during fetch, (5) title blurs during loading (blur-[1.5px] opacity-60), (6) all controls become interactive when album loads, (7) console has no errors. Tested at 1920x1080, 390x844, and 390x667 viewports. Lint (0 errors) and build (successful) validators passed. The implementation uses an AbortController pattern for request cancellation and requestIdRef for stale response protection, which prevents race conditions during rapid rerolls.
